description: Designed to be worn outside the racetrack these black sneakers from puma's ferrari range embodies all the excitement and energy of the race. The cylindrical heel and the design inspired by the typical puma strip make these shoes ultra comfortable and durable. Perfect for urban wear.Upper Leather, synthetic and TPU upper Engineered cylindrical heel and aerodynamic formstripe give the shoe a certain undeniable flow Scuderia Ferrari-specific iconic badge adorn the shoe Lace-up closure Breathable textile lining along the collar and the tongue Perforation near the toe box for ventilation Carbon rubber outsole embedded onto the upper for comfort Fit Midsole Lightweight EVA midsole for superior shock absorption Outsole Carbon rubber outsole with corrugated patterns for strong grip PUMA red cat logo for style detailing
